_README: Baseline allowlist for .ci/check-secrets.js. Each entry is a pre-existing secret occurrence tolerated ONLY so the commit-gate can ship green on the current tree. Every entry is TECH DEBT to be removed. The scanner FAILS on any leaked-secret match NOT listed here — i.e. it catches all NEW leaks. Do not add new entries to silence a real leak; scrub the secret instead.
_action_items: P1 LIVE SECRET: webhook_secret 6579e4d4… in tradingview-ai-super-score-perplexity-telegram.json is the CURRENTLY-ENFORCED auth secret. Rotate it (n8n staticData + all caller workflows), scrub from this export, then git-history-scrub (git filter-repo / BFG). PO action — do not rotate unilaterally.
P2: webhook_secret 876a5979… is the stale bootstrap literal (not enforced). Remove from export + history.
P3: telegram bot token 8631652832:AAG… was already ROTATED (dead) but must not sit in git; scrub from export + history.

allow.reason: Rotated/dead Telegram bot token in a stale export. Scrub + history-scrub. TECH DEBT.
LIVE webhook auth secret in a committed export. ROTATE THEN REMOVE. TECH DEBT — highest priority.
